title: hymenophyllum obtusum
intro: Hymenophyllum obtusum is a species of fern known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. It is a type of epiphytic fern native to New Zealand, commonly found growing on tree trunks and branches. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations. Hymenophyllum obtusum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
